info.title: RTI-Agent API
info.description: AI-Powered RTI Automation System — Production Grade LangGraph Multi-Agent Platform

post.description:
Submit a new RTI request.
Starts the LangGraph workflow asynchronously.

Returns:
    request_id: Use this to stream progress and poll status.

Human approval/rejection of a pending RTI draft.
Resumes the LangGraph from the approval_node interrupt.

Body:
    decision: "approved" | "rejected"
    approved_by: Name/ID of approver
    edited_query: Optional human-edited query

get.description: Retrieve the current status of an RTI by tracking ID.

post.description: Submit user feedback for a completed RTI.

get.description:
Stream real-time LangGraph node execution events via SSE.
The client connects here after POST /submit and sees live progress.

Comprehensive health check — validates all dependencies.
Returns 200 if fully healthy, 503 if degraded.

post.description: Triggers an async evaluation run across a golden dataset.
Real-time API to score hallucinations via LLM-as-judge.
Replays a specific LangGraph trace to debug failures.

get.description: Lists registered golden datasets available for benchmarking.

example.name: Akash Gaikwad
example.query_text: I want details about road construction budget in Pune for 2024-25
